lastSummary: Reviewed the past hour and found the main meaningful work already durably captured: the market-digest fanout sanity check, restored watchlist price enrichment fallback, successful manual Discord digest delivery, and the fresh-session handoff back to task-market-moving-news-digest.

Added the missing passive-work note for the noon market-digest run to today's daily note and lightly tightened the note ordering so the 11:03 GitHub sync entry sits chronologically before the later market-digest bullets.
Re-reviewed both long-lived Discord branch state files against the importance rubric, found no shared-important promotions waiting, and stamped fresh review metadata before rerunning automated sync.
